results.title: Android 11 | Product Hunt
results.content: # Android. ## Similar Products. ### Design & Creative. ### Trending categories. ### Top reviewed. ### Trending products. ### Top forum threads. ## Previous Android Launches. Launched on October 4th, 2023. Launched on September 9th, 2020. Launched on April 9th, 2020. Launched on February 8th, 2017. Wispr Flow: Dictation That Works Everywhere. Android 17 puts apps closer to the agent layer. With AppFunctions, an app can expose its own actions as local tools for Android MCP. @Gemini and other assistants can discover those actions and run workflows with access to the app’s local state. The UI still matters, but the app’s core capabilities can now become callable system-level tools. It also changes the baseline for app design. Developers now have to assume their apps may run across phones, tablets, foldables, desktop windows, floating bubbles, and handoff surfaces, and @Google is pushing Compose as the default way to build for that world. Can't wait to try it. #### What's great. #### What needs improvement.
